name: Easy Chicken and Vegetable Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a nonstick skillet; stir fry the chicken until thawed, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the vegetables and stir-fry until crisp-tender.
3. Stir in the contents of the sauce packet and cook until crisp-tender.
4. Stir in the contents of the second sauce packet and cook until hot.
5. Microwave French Fried onions for 1 minute. Sprinkle over the stir-fry. Serve warm.
